features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description: You gain proficiency with heavy armor.

features.name: Disciple of Life
features.description: Whenever you use a spell of 1st level or higher to restore hit points, the creature regains additional hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.

features.name: Channel Divinity: Preserve Life
features.description: As an action, restore hit points equal to five times your cleric level, divided among creatures within 30 feet (none above half its maximum; no effect on undead or constructs).

features.name: Blessed Healer
features.description: When you cast a spell of 1st level or higher that restores hit points to another creature, you regain 2 + the spell's level hit points.

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with a weapon attack, deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage.

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: Your Divine Strike extra radiant damage increases to 2d8.

features.name: Supreme Healing
features.description: When you would normally roll dice to restore hit points with a spell, use the highest possible number for each die instead.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You cast cleric spells using Wisdom, drawing from the whole cleric list; you prepare Wisdom modifier + cleric level spells each day and know all cantrips you've chosen.

features.name: Divine Domain
features.description: Your domain (chosen at 1st level) grants domain spells — always prepared, not counting against your limit — and extra features at 1st, 2nd, 6th, 8th, and 17th level.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: Channel divine energy for Turn Undead (each undead within 30 feet that can see or hear you must make a Wisdom save or be turned for 1 minute) or a domain effect. One use per short or long rest.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: Channel Divinity: two uses between rests.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: Channel Divinity: three uses between rests.

features.name: Destroy Undead
features.description: When an undead of CR 1/2 or lower fails its save against your Turn Undead, it is instantly destroyed.

features.name: Destroy Undead
features.description: Destroy Undead now affects undead of CR 1 or lower.

features.name: Destroy Undead
features.description: Destroy Undead now affects undead of CR 2 or lower.

features.name: Destroy Undead
features.description: Destroy Undead now affects undead of CR 3 or lower.

features.name: Destroy Undead
features.description: Destroy Undead now affects undead of CR 4 or lower.

features.name: Divine Intervention
features.description: As an action, call on your deity: roll percentile dice, and if you roll a number equal to or lower than your cleric level, the deity intervenes. On success you can't use it again for 7 days; otherwise after a long rest.

features.name: Divine Intervention
features.description: Your call for intervention succeeds automatically, no roll required (then unusable for 7 days).
